title: Tangy Kenyan Grains Curry
description: A flavorful, tangy Kenyan curry packed with mixed grains and a spicy tadka, perfect for meal‑prep and keto‑friendly comfort.

ingredients.name: Kenyan spice blend (turmeric, cumin, coriander, cayenne, salt)

instructions: In a pot, bring 1 cup of water to a boil. Add cooked millet and quinoa, simmer 10 minutes, then set aside.
Heat coconut oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add mustard seeds and cumin seeds; when popping, stir in ginger‑garlic paste and sauté 30 seconds.
Add diced tomatoes, cook 2 minutes until softened.
Sprinkle the Kenyan spice blend over the tomatoes, stir to coat, and cook 1 minute.
Add cauliflower rice, millet, and quinoa to the pan; mix well.
Pour in coconut milk and 1 cup of water (or broth). Bring to a gentle simmer.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and let the curry cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Check seasoning; add more salt or lemon juice if desired.
Remove from heat, sprinkle chopped cilantro, and stir.
Let the curry rest for 5 minutes before serving or storing in meal‑prep containers.
